'''Farsa Zirl''' was an employee of the [[LV Labs]] pharmaceutical company. Zirl sent out [[e-mail]] messages advertising a laser burn medication designed to relieve Imperial [[Laser/Legends|laser]] burns, and claimed it was also helpful to those recovering from [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] encasement.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
